module.name: HTML
module.param:
Version 0.6.1 (March 30th, 2026)
  • fixed a typo in the INGEST_EVAL for the call_id field
Version 0.6.0 (March 20th, 2026)
  • This app is now marked visible by default in the list of apps, and it now has a landing page build in the Sideview UI displaying some out-of-the box charts such as max concurrency over time, top calling parties, and some summary statistics including call counts by clientType and osType. NOTE: You must now also install Sideview's "Canary" app from Splunkbase.
  • Fixed the extraction of the critical call_id guids for "calls" and also for recurring meetings. Note this is an INGEST_EVAL which means this app should always be installed alongside the Cisco TA that is pulling in the data.
Version 0.5.0 (January 29th, 2026)
  • First public release
